visual_description: Two individuals stand facing each other in a dimly lit, cavernous space with dark, textured walls. They turn and move toward each other, embracing in a hug. Their postures shift from facing forward to leaning into the embrace, with their heads close together.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a slightly breathy quality, speaking at a moderate pace.
